_comment: Payable items. amount_cents drives Stripe Payment Link creation (scripts/stripe-links.mjs). payment_url is filled in by that script; clear a payment_url to have a fresh link minted at the current amount_cents. custom_amount=true creates a customer-chooses-amount link (used for T&E). Collection only — disbursing funds is human-authorized.
rate_note: Sessions are 90 minutes at $228. A full day is $2,280, plus travel & expenses (T&E).
